---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or feature for this project
labels: "enhancement"
---

## Feature Description

**What feature would you like to see added?**
[Describe the feature you want.]

**Problem Statement:**
[What problem does this feature solve?]

**Proposed Solution:**
[How would you like this feature to work?]

**Use Case:**
[Describe a specific use case or example scenario.]

**Alternative Solutions:**
[Have you considered other solutions?]

**Additional Context:**
[Add any other context, such as:
- Similar features in other libraries
- Technical implementation ideas
- Examples from other services]

**Impact:**
- [ ] Minor feature (single file change expected)
- [ ] Major feature (requires significant refactoring)
- [ ] Breaking change (requires API version bump)

**Related Issues:**
[Link to any related issues or discussions]

---

**Note:** The maintainers will review your feature request and may ask for additional details or clarification.
